info.title: GEO Brand Visibility Platform API
info.description: API for managing brand visibility projects and monitoring. All endpoints require JWT Bearer token authentication.

message.description: Message describing the result of the signup operation
message.example: User registered successfully. Please check your email for verification.

userId.description: ID of the newly created user

accessToken.description: JWT access token for authenticating subsequent requests

code.description: The authorization code returned by Google OAuth2.0 consent screen

codeVerifier.description: PKCE code verifier that was used to generate the code challenge in the initial authorization request

redirectUri.description: The redirect URI that was used in the initial authorization request

avatar.description: URL of the user avatar image

hasSeenTour.description: Whether the user has completed or skipped the product tour

projectId.description: ID of the project to which the brand belongs
The project ID this brand belongs to

logoUrl.description: Public URL of the brand logo image

defaultArticleImageUrl.description: Public URL of the default article cover image

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

blogHotline.example: News, updates, and insights from the team at Example Brand

revenueModel.description: Revenue models of the brand (free-form text)

customerType.description: Customer segments the brand serves (free-form text)

rewritePath.description: Path prefix for rewrite-based custom domain (e.g. /blog)

error.description: Human-readable error when domain is misconfigured or failed

logoUrl.description: Public URL of the brand logo image

defaultArticleImageUrl.description: Public URL of the default article cover image

socialBatchSize.description: Max number of social media posts to queue

count.description: Total number of times this domain was mentioned

distribution.description: Distribution percentage across different AI models
